channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Newsom blames Trump for DOJ probe, but reports say investigation predates his administration
item.description: Reports indicate the federal probe into Gavin Newsom's circle began under Biden, challenging his assertion of a Trump-led investigation.

item.title: Michigan Democrat Mallory McMorrow drops out of Senate race weeks before primary
item.description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow ended her U.S. Senate campaign before the Aug. 4 Democratic primary, leaving Haley Stevens and Abdul El-Say...

item.title: More Amazing Flyovers in DC - With Bonus Media Meltdown
PA's Gov Shapiro Now Has a Stark Warning for Democratic Socialists
